title: cymopterus newberryi var. jonesii
intro: Cymopterus newberryi var. jonesii, commonly known as Newberry's Desert Parsley, is a rare and endemic perennial plant native to the southwestern United States. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments such as respiratory issues and skin conditions. The therapeutic actions of Cymopterus newberryi var. jonesii include its ability to act as an expectorant, helping to relieve congestion and coughs, as well as its antiseptic properties, which can help to prevent the spread of infections. The bioactive constituents of this plant include sesquiterpene lactones, which are responsible for its therapeutic effects, although further research is needed to fully understand its pharmacological properties.
